title: AWS Cloud Engineer (L3) - (SME)
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Cloud Engineer lead (Level 3) to support cloud infrastructure for Commercial and Singapore Government-appointed agency operating across commercial cloud platforms.

This role requires experiences managing multi-cloud environments predominantly on Amazon Web Services (AWS), with knowledge in Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud Platform (GCP).


Key Responsibilities:

  • Multi-Cloud Infrastructure Operations - AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform, GCC+.
  • Operating System Lifecycle & Patch Management - Lead OS patching operations across RHEL (v8 to v10) and Windows Server (20162025), Linux administration with deep expertise in Wintel Operating System patching and management.
  • Application Deployment & Troubleshooting - Windows and Linux operating systems
  • Security & Compliance
  • Container & DevSecOps - (Docker, Kubernetes, ECS, EKS, AKS, GKE), DevSecOps practices (SHIP-HATS), CI/CD pipeline operations.
  • ITIL & Service Management - Incident, Problem, Change, and Request Management.
  • Tool Integration & Observability
  • Documentation & Knowledge Management
  • Leadership & Mentorship
  • Soft Skills & Competencies - Problem Solving
  • Subject Matter Expert (SME)

Skills & Experience:

  • Diploma or Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related discipline
  • Minimum 6+ years of hands-on cloud experience expetise supporting Cloud platforms - AWS. Azure, GCP, GCC.
  • Experise with Infrastructure as Code (laC) - Terraform, Ansible.
  • Experience with ITIL practices, ITSM ticketing systems.
  • Experience with application deployment and OS-level troubleshooting.
  • Experience with PowerShell scripting.
  • Understanding of Linux operating systems.
  • Mentoring and leading junior engineers
  • Normal working hours + Experience in 24/7 operational support environments with shift rotation
  • Understanding of Singapore Government technology standards and frameworks (e.g., SHIPHATS, IM8 Policy)

Preferred Certifications:

  • AWS Certified Solutions Architect -Associate / Professional
  • AWS Certified SysOps Administrator - Associate (preferred)
